form.label: Threshold Suggestions
form.description: Proposes max_latency_seconds and max_gap_seconds per monitored entity, computed from the past 7 days of indexed metadata. suggested_max_latency = round(P95(latency) × 1.5). suggested_max_gap = round(avg_interval × 5), where avg_interval = (max(_time) - min(_time)) / event_count. Review the deltas, then "Apply suggested ..." pushes the new value to every visible KV row in one batched write.

input.label: Show
input.choice: only rows where suggestion differs by > 10%

div.div: How to read this: the delta columns show suggested - current; positive means the suggestion is more lenient (longer window allowed) and negative means it's tighter. Use "Apply" with care on entities where the historical baseline isn't representative (recently bootstrapped sources, post-incident periods, etc.).

search.query: | `carbide_threshold_suggestions_hosts` | where match(coalesce(entity_key,""), "$search_tok$") | where if("$delta_tok$"="all", 1=1, abs(coalesce(delta_max_latency,0))/coalesce(current_max_latency,1) > 0.1 OR abs(coalesce(delta_max_gap,0))/coalesce(current_max_gap,1) > 0.1) | sort + entity_key | eval p95_latency = round(p95_latency, 1) | eval avg_interval = round(avg_interval, 1) | table _key, entity_key, current_max_latency, suggested_max_latency, delta_max_latency, current_max_gap, suggested_max_gap, delta_max_gap, event_count, p95_latency, avg_interval | rename entity_key as "entity", current_max_latency as "current_max_latency", suggested_max_latency as "suggested_max_latency", delta_max_latency as "Δ latency", current_max_gap as "current_max_gap", suggested_max_gap as "suggested_max_gap", delta_max_gap as "Δ gap", event_count as "events (7d)", p95_latency as "p95 latency (s)", avg_interval as "avg interval (s)"

div.button: Apply suggested max_latency to filtered rows
Apply suggested max_gap to filtered rows

search.query: | `carbide_threshold_suggestions_sources` | where match(coalesce(entity_key,""), "$search_tok$") | where if("$delta_tok$"="all", 1=1, abs(coalesce(delta_max_latency,0))/coalesce(current_max_latency,1) > 0.1 OR abs(coalesce(delta_max_gap,0))/coalesce(current_max_gap,1) > 0.1) | sort + entity_key | eval p95_latency = round(p95_latency, 1) | eval avg_interval = round(avg_interval, 1) | table _key, entity_key, current_max_latency, suggested_max_latency, delta_max_latency, current_max_gap, suggested_max_gap, delta_max_gap, event_count, p95_latency, avg_interval | rename entity_key as "entity", current_max_latency as "current_max_latency", suggested_max_latency as "suggested_max_latency", delta_max_latency as "Δ latency", current_max_gap as "current_max_gap", suggested_max_gap as "suggested_max_gap", delta_max_gap as "Δ gap", event_count as "events (7d)", p95_latency as "p95 latency (s)", avg_interval as "avg interval (s)"

div.button: Apply suggested max_latency to filtered rows
Apply suggested max_gap to filtered rows
